children.description: Porpita linnaena — a hydrozoan species in the genus Porpita.

children.name: Porpita porpita
children.description: Porpita porpita, or the blue button, is a marine organism consisting of a colony of hydroids found in the warmer, tropical and sub-tropical waters of the Pacific, Atlantic, and Indian oceans, as well as the Mediterranean Sea and eastern Arabian Sea.

children.name: Porpita prunella
children.description: Porpita prunella is a marine species of hydrozoan organisms within the family Porpitidae.
